name: Killer sans | STALKER |
description:
from feeling like you have been watched all night, blaming it on the amount of drinks you've had, you exit the club without worry just for your fears to become true.

____________________________

this is my first and last bot i will be making, thanks a bunch for the support on it!

im having fun reading all these reviews, makes me truly happy to see people enjoying it! though this is gonna be my last update to the bot

by yours truly, as a thank you!
